title: Resonant Battles - Battle Music
description: A resource pack that adds different types of battle music for Cobblemon
body:
The Battle Music Pack from Resonant Routes!

This resource pack adds new and reimagined versions of battle music from different Pokemon generations that play when battling Wild Pokemon, Players, and NPCs in Cobblemon!

- To install the pack, place the .zip into your resourcepacks and enable it ingame.

I recommend using my other pack [Resonant Routes](https://modrinth.com/project/4gucCQNi) together with _Resonant Battles_, but you can use any other existing music packs in combination with this pack.


I did not make any of the music being used. These are arrangements and remasters made by a few creators on Youtube.

---------------

_Current tracklist as of v1.1_:

**Wild Battles**
- Unova Wild _(Scarlet/Violet: Indigo Disk)_
- South Province Wild _(Scarlet/Violet)_
- Alola Wild _(US/UM)_
- Kalos Wild _(X/Y)_
- Sinnoh Wild _(Bliitzit Arrangement)_
- Hoenn Wild _(Zame Arrangement)_
- Johto Wild _(Pokestir Arrangement)_
- Kanto Wild _(Pokestir Arrangement)_


**Player Battles**
- Paldea Trainer _(Pokemon Masters EX)_
- Johto Trainer _(Pokemon Masters EX)_
- Galar Gym Leader EX _(Pokemon Masters EX)_
- Unova Trainer _(Scarlet/Violet: Indigo Disk)_
- Champion Kieran _(Scarlet/Violet: Indigo Disk)_
- Hoenn Trainer _(Zame Arrangement)_
- Kanto Trainer _(Zame Arrangement)_
- Champion Cynthia - B2/W2 Version _(Zame Arrangement)_
- Champion Blue - B2/W2 Version _(Zame Arrangement)_
- Champion Lance/Red - HG/SS Version _(Zame Arrangement)_
- Rival Silver - HG/SS Version _(Zame Arrangement)_
- Colress _(StevenMix Arrangement)_


**NPC Battles**
- Paldea Trainer _(Pokemon Masters EX)_
- Galar Trainer _(Pokemon Masters EX)_
- Unova Trainer _(Pokemon Masters EX)_
- Sinnoh Trainer _(Pokemon Masters EX)_
- Johto Trainer _(Pokemon Masters EX)_
- Kanto Trainer _(Pokemon Masters EX)_
- Hoenn Trainer _(Zame Arrangement)_
- Kalos Trainer _(Zame Arrangement)_
